brand: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic
docTitle: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic · Chreje ri banoj c'ä che ri iglesia

share.title: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic
share.text: Pa xa jun chapanic, chariko ri nimalaj tzijonem re ri Loc'olaj Pixab — xukuje' jas che xpe ri Jesus.

epochs.title: Ri banoj
epochs.one: Ri Dios xuban jun uwächulew ri «sibalaj utz».
epochs.people: Ri Dios; ri Adan ruc' ri Eva
epochs.events: Wakib k'ij re banoj, ri winak banom che u wäch ri Dios, ri uxlanibal k'ij
epochs.q: Aretak xchapletaj u banic ronojel ri c'olic, ri Dios xuban ri caj ulew.
epochs.christ: Ri uwächulew xbanic rumal ri «Tzij». Ri Utzalaj Tzij re ri Xuan cubij chi we Tzij ri' are ri Jesus rib (Ri Xuan 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man cuchaplej taj ruc' jun na'oj re winak, xane' ruc' jun bixonem: «Aretak xchapletaj ronojel, ri Dios…» Ri uwächulew man xa ta c'ut xc'oji'c, xane' are u chac jun Dios ri c'o u c'aslemal.

  • U wächbal ri Dios · chquixo'l ronojel ri banom, xak xuwi ri winak banom che resaxic ri Dios — che retamaxic xukuje' che u chajixic ri uwächulew.
  • Uxlanem · ri uxlanem re ri wuk k'ij cuc'ut chi ronojel tz'akatinak xukuje' c'o jamaril (shalom): «utz».
  • Eden · ri uwächulew aretak c'ä ma jewi' x-poro'tajic, jawi' ri Dios ruc' ri winak quebin junam.
epochs.next: Are c'u wa' tz'akat jeb'el u wäch jubic' chic cäporo'tajic…

epochs.title: Ri tzakic
epochs.one: Ri mac xoquic, xukuje' x-q'upitaj ri rachilanic chquixo'l ri winak ruc' ri Dios.
epochs.people: Ri Adan ruc' ri Eva; ri cumatz (Satanas)
epochs.events: Cäquitij ri awajital wäch che', cäwesax bic pa ri Eden, cäpe ri cämical ruc' ri c'ax
epochs.q: Quinban na chi ri at xukuje' ri ixok, quic'ulelaj na iwib… Ri rija'lil cuwach' na ri a jolom.
epochs.christ: Ri nabe u bixic ri utzalaj tzij, yo'm aretak xtzak ri winak: ri «rija'lil ri ixok» cuwach' na ri u jolom ri cumatz — are c'u wa' ri Jesus (Chapletajic 3:15; Aj Romab 16:20; Aj Galasib 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Rumal ri man c'ulanic re u rayixic «queux jacha' ri Dios», ri mac xoc cho ri uwächulew. Ri c'olic man xa ta jun q'uipital pixab, xane' jun q'upital rachilanic.

  • Q'upital rachilanic · ruc' ri Dios (cäquewaj quib), ruc' niq'uiaj chic (cäquiya' mac), ruc' ri banom (k'ix ruc' c'ax).
  • Cämical · ri pixabanic «kas catcäm na» cux kas tzij.
  • Chapletajic 3:15 · pune' c'u chuxo'l ri k'atbal tzij, cäya' nabe ri u bixic ri toc'obanic. Ri etamanelab cäquibij che wa' ri «protoevangelium» (ri nabe utzalaj tzij).
epochs.next: Wacamic ri Dios cusic'ij jun winak che u chapic ri toc'obanic…

epochs.title: Ri qui tat qui nan
epochs.one: Ri Dios cubij che ri Abraham: «Catux na jun tewichibal».
epochs.events: Ri trato ruc' ri Abraham, ri u sipaxic ri Isaac, ri cablajuj u c'ojol ri Jacob, ri Jose cux nim winak pa Ejipt
epochs.q: Quinban na jun nim tinimit… conojel ri winak cho ri uwächulew cäquirik na tewichibal rumal awech.
epochs.christ: Ri u bixic chi «conojel ri winak cäquirik na tewichibal» cätzakat ruc' ri Jesus, ri rija'lil ri Abraham (Aj Galasib 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Ri Dios cuchaplej u banic utzil che ri c'ax re conojel ri winak rumal u sic'ixic jun winak, ri Abraham. Ri u c'u'x are ri trato (u bixic) — jun nim tinimit, jun ulew, xukuje' «tewichibal che conojel ri winak.»

  • Cojonic · ri Abraham xcojon che ri u bixic ri man cäk'alajin taj, xukuje' xajilax suc' che (Chapletajic 15:6).
  • Isaac ruc' Jacob · ri u bixic cäk'ax bic; ri Jacob (Israel) cux qui tat ri cablajuj alaxic.
  • Jose · xc'ayix cumal ri rachalal pune' jeri', xpaki' chrij ri takanic — «ri Dios u q'uexom we c'ax ri' pa utzil» (Chapletajic 50:20).
epochs.next: Xterene' ri Jose, ri ja' xebec pa Ejipt — xukuje' xeux patanijela'b…

epochs.title: Ri elem ruc' ri juyub takaj
epochs.one: Ri Dios xresaj jun tinimit patanijela'b xukuje' xuban quech rib.
epochs.events: Ri lajuj c'axc'olil, ri Pascua, ri ic'owem pa ri quiäk mar, ri Lajuj Pixab pa ri Sinai, ri rachoch ri Dios, 40 junab pa ri juyub takaj
epochs.q: Quixinc'am na ix jacha' che nu tinimit, are c'u ri in quinux na i Dios.
epochs.christ: Ri Pascua — jawi' ri u quic'el ri carnel xresaj ri cämical — cuc'ut ri Jesus, «ri ka Pascua», ri xrip rumal kech (Nabe aj Corintib 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Ri nimalaj toc'obanic re ri ojer pixab. Ri Israel ri patanijela'b, xtzokopix rumal ru chuk'ab ri Dios xukuje' xux che ru tinimit.

  • Ri Pascua · ri ja' ri c'o u quic'el carnel pa ru chi', cäresax che ri cämical — u wächbal re ronojel ri sipanic ri xpe na.
  • Ri quiäk mar · toc'obanic jawi' man c'o ta chi be; ri «ic'owem chrij» cux retal jun c'ac' u chapic.
  • Ri trato re Sinai · rumal ri Lajuj Pixab cäquetamaj jas cäquibano jacha' ru tinimit ri Dios.
  • Ri rachoch ri Dios · jun loc'olaj ja ri cäc'ambalic jawi' ri Dios c'o chquixo'l ru tinimit — jun nabe retal re ri «Emanuel.»
  • 40 junab · rumal ri man c'ulanic jun alaxic cäc'a'y pa ri juyub takaj, pune' jeri' ri Dios c'o cuc' ruc' ri manaj ruc' ri u jolom sutz' ruc' k'ak'.
epochs.next: Cänan tak chuwäch ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem, cäquichap u banic ri oquem…

epochs.title: Ri ch'aquibal ruc' ri k'atal tak tzij
epochs.one: Xquic'amo ri ulew, are c'u man c'o ta ajawinel, chquijujunal cäquiban ri cäkaj chquiwäch.
epochs.people: Josue; k'atal tak tzij jacha' ri Gedeon ruc' ri Sanson; Rut
epochs.events: Ri tzakem re Jerico, ri c'olem pa Canaan, jun jutak mul re mac–k'atbal tzij–toc'obanic
epochs.q: Pa tak ri k'ij ri' maja' ajawinel pa Israel, chquijujunal c'ut are cäquiban ri cäkaj chquiwäch.
epochs.christ: Chrij ri rija'lil ri Rut cäpe ri David, xukuje' chrij ri rija'lil ri David cäpe ri Jesus (Ri Mateo 1). Pune' c'o chu'mil, ri rija'lil ri Mesias cäbe na chuwäch.
epochs.detail:
Chuxe' ri Josue queboc pa ri ulew yo'm pa bixonem, are c'u aretak xec'oji'c xa chanim cäquisach u wäch ri Dios. Ri K'atal tak Tzij are wa' xa jun banoj jutak mul.

  • Ri jutak mul re mac · mac → c'axc'olil → sic'inic → jun k'atal tzij cätoc'obanic → mac chic. Xak cäc'axc'obirik.
  • Ri k'atal tak tzij · Gedeon, Sanson, Debora — toc'obanela'b xa che jun rat'al, pune' nimak ri caqui ban, c'o c'u qui mac.
  • Rut · jun jeb'elalaj tzijonem re jiquilal pa jun c'axalaj k'ij; jun ixok jun chic u tinimit cäoc pa ri rija'lil ri David (xukuje' ri Jesus).
epochs.next: Ri winak cäquibij ruc' ki sic'inic: «¡Chaya' jun ka ajawinel xukuje'!»…

epochs.title: Ri jun ajawibal
epochs.one: Ri Dios cubij che ri David: «Ri a tem re ajawibal cäc'oji' na chbe k'ij sak.»
epochs.events: Ri nabe ajawinel Saul, ri David ruc' ri Goliat, ri trato ruc' ri David, ri Salomon cuban ri rachoch ri Dios
epochs.q: Ri awija'lil xukuje' ri awajawinic quecanaj jic… ri a tem re ajawibal cäjekebax can chbe k'ij sak.
epochs.christ: Ri «tem re ajawibal chbe k'ij sak» cätzakat ruc' ri Jesus, ri rija'lil ri David — rumal ri' cäbix che «u C'ojol ri David» (Ri Lucax 1:32-33; Ri Mateo 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Ri nimalaj k'ij re Israel, chuxe' oxib ajawinelab.

  • Saul · ri nabe ajawinel ri xtak'ix cumal ri winak; utz u chapic pune' jeri' xch'akatajic rumal ri man c'ulanic.
  • David · «jun achi jacha' ri caraj ri ranima ri Dios.» Cuch'ac ri Goliat xukuje' cuban ri Jerusalen che ru tinimit nim u k'ij. Cuban jun nimalaj mac (ruc' Betsabe) pune' jeri' cuk'ax ranima ruc' ronojel ranima (Salmib 51).
  • Ri trato ruc' ri David (Ucab Samuel 7) · ri Dios cubij chi cujekeba' can ru ja David chbe k'ij sak — ri kas u xe' ri eyebal re ri Mesias.
  • Salomon · pa nim u na'oj ruc' u k'inomal cuban ri rachoch ri Dios, are c'u che ri k'isbal re u c'aslemal cätzak che ri xajbal idolos.
epochs.next: Xterene' ri Salomon, ri ajawibal cäjach pa cu'b…

epochs.title: Ri q'upital ajawibal
epochs.one: Cäjach pa relbal k'ij (Juda) ruc' pa rokebal k'ij (Israel), xukuje' jubic' jubic' cätzakic.
epochs.people: Ri ajawinelab quech quieb ajawibal; k'axal tak tzij jacha' ri Elias, Isaiy, Jeremiy
epochs.events: Ri q'upital ajawibal, ri xajbal idolos, ri u pixabaxic ri k'axal tak tzij
epochs.q: Ri Israel je xuban wa' che resaxic rib chuxe' ri cajawinic ri e rija'lil ri David c'ä camic.
epochs.christ: Pa wa' k'ij ri k'axal tak tzij cäquibij chic k'alaj ri Mesias ri cäpe na (Ri Isaiy 9:6; Ri Isaiy 53).
epochs.detail:
Pa ri u k'ij ri u c'ojol ri Salomon ri tinimit cäjachic: ri ajawibal re rokebal k'ij Israel (lajuj alaxic, u tinimit Samaria) xukuje' ri ajawibal re relbal k'ij Juda (quieb alaxic, u tinimit Jerusalen).

  • Israel (rokebal k'ij) · conojel ri ajawinelab cäquipatanij idolos; cätzak chuwäch ri Asiria pa ri junab 722 nabe che K.
  • Juda (relbal k'ij) · ri rija'lil ri David cäbe na chuwäch, ruc' jujun utzalaj ajawinelab jacha' ri Ezequias ruc' ri Josias, are c'u che ronojel cätzakic.
  • Ri k'axal tak tzij · Elias, Amos, Isaiy, Jeremiy cäquibij «¡chixtzelej!» Ri u bixic ri Mesias cänimar chic waral (ri «c'axalaj patanijel» re ri Isaiy 53).
epochs.next: Che ri k'isbal cäpe ri k'atbal tzij yo'm: cäquesax bic pa jun tinimit chic…

epochs.title: Ri c'amem bic
epochs.one: Ri ajawibal cätzakic xukuje' ri winak cäquesax bic pa jun ulew chic.
epochs.events: Ri Israel cätzak chuwäch ri Asiria (722); ri Juda cätzak chuwäch ri Babilon xukuje' cäporox ri rachoch ri Dios (586)
epochs.q: Uj t'uyul chquinakaj ri nima' re Babilon, cujok'ic aretak cänataj ri Sion chke.
epochs.christ: Pa ri kajbal re ri bisonem ri Jeremiy cubij u bixic jun «c'ac' c'ulwächinic» (Ri Jeremiy 31:31) — are' wa' ri trato ri xuban ri Jesus pa ri k'isbal wa'im.
epochs.detail:
Ri pixabanic cux kas tzij. Ri rachoch ri Dios cäporoxic xukuje' ri winak cäc'am bic pa Babilon — cäquitzako ri ulew, ri ajawinel, xukuje' ri rachoch ri Dios: ri kas c'ax re ronojel.

  • Quieb tzakem · ri Israel (Asiria, 722 nabe che K.) xukuje' ri Juda (Babilon, 586 nabe che K.).
  • Daniel · jun u wächbal cojonic pune' pa jun ajawibal man cäcojon ta che ri Dios (pa ri u jul ri coj); cärilo ri u wächbal jun «ajawibal chbe k'ij sak» ri cäpe na.
  • Jun rat'al re eyebal · ri u wächbal ri David re ri chakij b'aqil ri cäc'astaj chic (Ezequiel 37) xukuje' ri «c'ac' trato» re ri Jeremiy cäquic'ut jun cäpe pa ri k'eku'm.
epochs.next: Oxc'al lajuj junab ic'owinak chic, ri Dios cujak ri be: cäquitzelej bic chcachoch…

epochs.title: Ri tzelejem ulok
epochs.one: Cäquitzelej ulok xukuje' cäquiyac chic ri rachoch ri Dios ruc' ri tapia.
epochs.events: Tzelejem rumal ru pixab ri Ciro, u yaquic ri rachoch ri Dios, u banic ri tapia re Jerusalen, u tzelexic ri Tzij
epochs.q: Are c'ut ri u quicotemal ri Ajawaxel are cayo'w ka chuk'ab.
epochs.christ: Ri Malaquias, ri k'isbal wuj re ri ojer pixab, cuk'is u bixic jun takom che u banic ri be re ri Mesias: «Quintak bic ri nu tako'n» (Ri Malaquias 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Rumal ru pixab ri ajawinel re Persia, ri Ciro (538 nabe che K.), cächaplet ri tzelejem. Pa oxib mul cäquitzelej ulok xukuje' cäquiyac chic ri x-tzakic.

  • Zorobabel · cuyac chic ri rachoch ri Dios (xtz'akat 516 nabe che K.).
  • Esdras · cuc'ut chic ri Tzij xukuje' cuyac ri cojonic.
  • Nehemiy · cuyac ri tapia re Jerusalen pa 52 k'ij.
  • Ester · cuto' chquiwäch ri queböc'ow ri aj Israel pa Persia — «xa rumal wa' k'ij ri'.»
  • Jun rayinic ri c'ä k'olic · ri rachoch ri Dios c'olic, are c'u man c'o ta jun ajawinel jacha' ri David. Ri winak cäquieyej ri Mesias.
epochs.next: Te c'ut… jacha' ta ri caj xtanin chic, 400 junab queböc'owic.

epochs.tag: CHQUIXO'L RI PIXAB · U BANIC RI BE
epochs.title: Ri junab re taninic
epochs.one: 400 junab man c'o ta u ch'abal jun k'axal tzij — pune' jeri' ri be cäbanic pa taninic.
epochs.events: Persia → Grecia → tzokopital re ri Macabeos → takanic re Roma
epochs.q: C'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xesuc'umataj ronojel, ri Dios xutak ulok ri u C'ojol, ri xalax rumal jun ixok.
epochs.christ: Ronojel wa' «u banic ri be» are u chac ri Dios rech ri Jesus xpe na «aretak xesuc'umataj ronojel.»
epochs.detail:
Chreje ri Malaquias c'ä che ri c'ac' pixab, raj 400 junab queböc'ow man c'o ta jun c'ac' tz'ibatal Tzij. Pune' jeri', chrij ri tzijonem ri Dios cubano ri be re ri utzalaj tzij.

  • Cäjal ri nimak tinimit · Persia → Grecia (Alejandro, 333 nabe che K.) → ri Tolomeos ruc' ri Seleucos → ri yactajem re ri Macabeos (167 nabe che K.) → Roma (63 nabe che K.).
  • Ri ch'abal griego · ru ch'akem ri Alejandro xuban ri griego che ri ch'abal re conojel; ri ojer pixab xk'axtaj pa griego (ri Septuaginta), cubano ri be rech ri utzalaj tzij cäquij u wäch chanim.
  • Ri be ruc' ri jamaril re Roma · ri utzalaj tak be xukuje' ri «Pax Romana» queux be re u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tzij.
  • Synagoga ruc' molaj · ri tijonic pa synagoga cuya' rakan; cäquichap u banic ri fariseos ruc' ri saduceos; xukuje' ri rayinic re ri Mesias cäc'oji' u wäch.
epochs.next: Te c'ut, aretak cäk'is ri taninic — che ri k'isbal, cäpe.

epochs.title: Cäpe ri Jesus
epochs.date: raj 4 nabe che K.–30 chrij K.
epochs.one: Ri Mesias yo'm pa bixonem xpe, xcämic, xukuje' xc'astaj chic.
epochs.people: Jesus, ri cablajuj tijoxelab, Xuan Bautista
epochs.events: Ri u winakirem (Navidad), ri u patan ruc' ri u tijonic ruc' ri cajmabal taj, ri cämical pa ri ripibal, ri c'astajibal pa rox k'ij
epochs.q: Ri Tzij xuc'am ri qui banic winak, xc'oji' chkaxo'l… nojinak che tok'ob xukuje' kastzij.
epochs.christ: Ri rija'lil ri ixok (banoj 2), ri tewichibal re Abraham (3), ri carnel re Pascua (4), ri ajawinel chbe k'ij sak re David (6), ri c'ac' trato (8) — conojel cätzakat ruc' xa jun winak, ri Jesus: ri kas ka k'axal tzij, ka sacerdot, ruc' ka ajawinel.
epochs.detail:
Cäk'is ri taninic; cäpe ri yo'm pa bixonem. Ri quiejeb utzalaj tzij cäquik'alajisaj ri u c'aslemal, u cämical, ruc' ri c'astajibal re ri Jesus pa quiejeb peteneb.

  • U winakirem · ri Dios xux winak (Emanuel, «ri Dios c'o kuc'»), pa ri q'uixbalaj k'olibal re Belen.
  • U patan · cuc'ut ri rajawibal ri Dios, cucunaj ri yawab, cusic'ij ri ajmaquib. «Ri xilow nu wäch xrilo ri Tataxel.»
  • Ri ripibal · cutoj pa ka q'uexel ri u q'uexel ri mac ruc' ri cämical ri xpe rumal ri tzakic (banoj 2). Ri kas carnel re Pascua.
  • C'astajibal · cäc'astaj pa rox k'ij, cuwach' ru chuk'ab ri mac, ri cämical, ruc' ri Satanas — pa ri ripibal «xch'äcan paquiwi'» ri c'o qui takanic ruc' ri c'o qui cuinem (Aj Colosayib 2:15).

Rumal ri' ri Jesus are ka kas k'axal tzij (cuc'ut ri be che ri Dios), ka kas sacerdot (cutoj ri mac ruc' ri u c'aslemal rib), xukuje' ka kas ajawinel (cuch'ac ri mac, ri cämical, ruc' ri Satanas xukuje' cätaqui'n chbe k'ij sak).
epochs.next: Ri Jesus c'astajinak cuetak ri tijoxelab cho ri uwächulew…

epochs.title: Ri u chapic ri iglesia
epochs.one: Cäpe ri Uxlabixel, xukuje' ri utzalaj tzij cäquij u wäch c'ä che tak ri qui chi' ri uwächulew.
epochs.events: Ri u kajem ri Uxlabixel pa Pentecostes, cäwinakir ri iglesia, ri utzalaj tzij cäquij u wäch chreje Jerusalen c'ä che Roma rumal ri c'axc'olil
epochs.q: Aretak c'u chpe ri Ruxlabal ri Dios piwi', quic'am na cuinem… quixel c'u na bic… c'o wi cho ronojel ri uwächulew.
epochs.christ: Wa' tzijonem c'ä cätajin na wacamic. Ri Loc'olaj Pixab cäk'is ruc' ri u bixic chi ri Jesus cäpe na chic xukuje' cuban c'ac' che ronojel (Ri K'alajisanic 21).
epochs.detail:
Xterene' ri Jesus xpaki' chicaj, ri Uxlabixel yo'm pa bixonem cäpe pa Pentecostes xukuje' cäwinakir ri iglesia. Ri utzalaj tzij cäquij u wäch ruc' nim chuk'ab.

  • Pentecostes · ri Uxlabixel cuban ri tijoxelab ri quexe'jic queux k'alajisanela'b chuc'ux.
  • Pedro · cutzijoj ri utzalaj tzij chque ri aj Israel pa Jerusalen.
  • Pablo · chreje c'axc'olisanel cux apostol, cuyac iglesias pa ronojel ri uwächulew re ri man e aj Israel taj xukuje' cutz'ibaj ri wuj.
  • C'ä che tak ri qui chi' ri uwächulew · Jerusalen → Judey → Samar → Roma. Ri u bixic che ri Abraham re «conojel ri winak» cux kas tzij.
  • Xukuje' ri uj · ri tzijonem man cäk'is taj; cäbe na chuwäch c'ä che ri u tzelejem ri Jesus ruc' ri c'ac' caj ruc' c'ac' ulew.
epochs.next: Are c'u ri tzijonem man cäk'is ta waral…

epochs.title: Ri utzalanem (ronojel c'ac')
epochs.one: Ri Jesus cäpe na chic xukuje' cuban c'ac' che ronojel.
epochs.people: Ri Jesus ri cäpe na chic; conojel ri tinimit
epochs.events: Ri u tzelejem, ri k'isbal k'atbal tzij, ri u k'isic ri mac·cämical·ok'ej, jun c'ac' caj ruc' c'ac' ulew
epochs.q: Cusu' na ronojel ri u wa'l qui wäch ri e ok'inak. Man c'o ta chi cämical. Man c'o ta chi bis, man c'o ta chi curak u chi' rumal c'ax.
epochs.christ: Ri Eden re ri nabe banoj cäutzalax na pa ri k'isbal jacha' ri «C'ac' Jerusalen.» Ri Dios cäc'oji' na ruc' ru tinimit chbe k'ij sak — ri tz'akatil re ri Emanuel (Ri K'alajisanic 21:3; Ri Mateo 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man cäk'is ta pa ri u k'ij ri iglesia. Ri u k'isbal wuj, ri K'alajisanic, cuc'ut ri Jesus ri cäpe na chic che u tz'akatisaxic ronojel.

  • Ri u tzelejem · ri ajawinel yo'm pa bixonem cäpe na ruc' juluwem.
  • Ri k'isbal ch'akanem · ri Satanas ruc' ri cämical cäch'aquic chbe k'ij sak, xukuje' ri Crist cätaqui'n jacha' Ajawinel quech ri ajawinelab (Nabe aj Corintib 15:25-26; Ri K'alajisanic 20:10).
  • K'atbal tzij ruc' c'astajibal · ronojel ri man suc' taj cäsuc'umax na, xukuje' ri e cäminak cäquic'astaj na.
  • Jun c'ac' caj ruc' c'ac' ulew · ri mac, ri cämical, ri ok'ej, ruc' ri c'ax cäsach na chbe k'ij sak (Ri K'alajisanic 21:4).
  • Ri Eden utzalaxinak chic · pa jun «C'ac' Jerusalen» ri utz na chuwäch ri nabe, ri Dios cäc'oji' na ruc' ru tinimit chbe k'ij sak — ri jawi' cäbe wi ronojel ri Loc'olaj Pixab.

Rumal ri' wacamic are u k'ij ri «xbantajic chic, pune' jeri' c'ä mawi tz'akat»: ruc' ri Jesus ri toc'obanic xbantaj chic, are c'u ri u tz'akatil c'ä cäeyexic.
epochs.next: ¿Jas c'u che cubij ronojel wa' tzijonem chwe «in»?

love: Ri u chapic ri tzijonem man are ta k'atbal tzij, xane' jun uwächulew banom rumal jun nojinak lok'ok'enic.
Aretak ri winak xmacunic, xa chi' chanim ri Dios xubij ri toc'obanic.
Ri Dios nabe xtzucun che ri man takal ta che, xusic'ij ruc' ru bi', xukuje' xubano che jun tewichibal.
Xuta ri ok'ej re ri tinimit patanijela'b xukuje' rib xkaj ulok che qui toc'oxic.
Pune' xeq'uextaj che jutak mul, ronojel mul aretak xesic'inic xutak jun toc'obanel xukuje' xebuyac chic.
Mawi xuwesaj ru c'u'x che ri tzakinak David; rumal rib xubij jun ajawinel chbe k'ij sak.
Che ri tinimit ri xresaj rib che xutak chquij ri k'axal tak tzij, ruc' bochi'nem: «Chattzelej, cha'.»
C'ä pa ri kas c'axalaj ulew re ri c'amem bic xkaj ulok cuc' xukuje' xubij ri utzalanem.
C'ä che ri tinimit ri xq'uextaj che jutak mul man xresaj ta ru bixic, xane' xebuyac chic.
C'ä pa ri 400 junab re taninic, pa awatal, xubano ri be re ri toc'obanic.
Aretak c'ä uj ajmaquib, xutak ulok ri u C'ojol che u ya'ic ri u c'aslemal.
We lok'ok'enic ri xkac'amo, wacamic cutak che kajem cho ronojel ri uwächulew.
Che ri k'isbal cusu' na ronojel ri u wa'l qui wäch xukuje' cuban c'ac' che ronojel pa lok'ok'enic.

mis.w: «¿Jas che ri Dios xuban jun winak ri cäcuin che macunic? ¿Mawi utz na we man ta xojubano?»
mis.t: Ri Dios xuban ri uwächulew ruc' ri winak man rumal ta jun rajawaxic, xane' rumal jun nojinak lok'ok'enic. U banic ri winak che jun winak ri cäc'oji' u rachilanic ruc' ri Dios are' wa' lok'ok'enic. Xukuje' c'ä ri oquem re ri mac man xel ta chrij ri u chomanic toc'obanic re ri Dios (Aj Epesib 1:4-5). Ri nabe banoj re ri Loc'olaj Pixab man are ta k'atbal tzij, xane' lok'ok'enic.

mis.w: «¿Xa rumal u tijic jun wäch che' cäwesax bic xukuje' cäya' ri cämical che? ¿Mawi sibalaj cow ri Dios?»
mis.t: Ri elem bic pa Eden are k'atbal tzij xukuje' toc'obanic. We ta ri winak, tasom chrij ri Dios xukuje' pa we c'olem poro'tajinak, cutij che ri wäch che' re c'aslemal xukuje' cäc'asi' chbe k'ij sak, cäcanaj na pa c'ax chbe k'ij sak (Chapletajic 3:22). U ya'ic c'olibal che ri cämical xujak jun be re tzelejem; xa chi' chanim ri Dios xubij jun toc'obanel (Chapletajic 3:15). Pa ri k'atbal tzij c'o chic lok'ok'enic.

mis.w: «¿Ri Abraham xtak'ix rumal nim u cojonic; mawi conojel ri winak re ri Loc'olaj Pixab e utzalaj tak achijab?»
mis.t: Ri Abraham xukuje' xban tzij ruc' xcab u c'u'x, xukuje' ri Jacob xa subunel. Ri Dios man xusic'ij ta ri «e takalic», xane' xusic'ij ri e c'o qui mac, rumal ri u tok'ob. Ri u xe' ri sic'inic man are ta ri qui utzil, xane' ri jiquilalaj lok'ok'enic re ri Dios (Ri Deuteronomio 7:7-8).

mis.w: «¿Mawi ri pixab jun choboj ri c'o che kac'ulamaxic rech cojcolotajic?»
mis.t: Ri Dios xebucol nabe chuwäch ri u ya'ic ri pixab. C'ä ri Lajuj Pixab cäquichap ruc' jun bixonem re toc'obanic: «In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios, ri xatresaj ulok pa Ejipt» (Elem 20:2). Ri pixab man are ta «chanima' rech catcolotajic,» xane' jun lok'olaj c'utubal chrij jas cäc'asi' jun tinimit colotajinak chic rumal ri tok'ob (Ri Deuteronomio 7:7-9). Ronojel mul nabe ri tok'ob; ri nimanic are ri c'ulanic.

mis.w: «Ri ch'aquibal re Canaan jun camisanic ri man c'o ta toc'obanic che — kas tzij c'ut ri Dios re ojer pixab cow ranima.»
mis.t: Are wa' jun c'ax ri man cäk'is ta pa xa jun tzij, xukuje' cäraj na chajinic. Are c'u ri Loc'olaj Pixab man cuc'ut ta wa' jacha' jun c'axanic chak, xane' jacha' jun k'atbal tzij xterene' jujun siglos re nimalaj etzelal (cucanaj quic'o' ri u sipaxic ac'alab), xterene' nim u paciencia (Chapletajic 15:16; Ri Deuteronomio 9:4-5; Ri Levitico 18:24-25). Ri Dios man cäranima' taj pune' che ri k'atbal tzij, xukuje' cuc'ulaj ruc' quicotemal ri cätzelej ruc'; pune' jun winak jun chic u tinimit, jacha' ri Rahab ruc' ri Rut (Ri Josue 6:25; Rut 4:13-17).

mis.w: «Ri David jun achi ri man c'o ta u mac — rumal ri' xbix che “jun achi jacha' ri caraj ri ranima ri Dios.”»
mis.t: Ri David xuban mac ruc' jun ixok xukuje' c'ä camisanic. «Jun achi jacha' ri caraj ri ranima ri Dios» man cubij ta chi man c'o ta u mac, xane' jun ri man xrewaj ta ru mac — ri xuk'ax ranima ruc' ronojel xukuje' ronojel mul xtzelej ruc' ri Dios (Salmib 51). Ri u lok'ok'enic ri Dios man cuwesaj ta ru c'u'x c'ä che ri tzakinak nim.

mis.w: «Ri k'axal tzij jun ajk'ij ri cubij ri cäpe na — ri Dios re ojer pixab xa cäch'awic.»
mis.t: Ri u c'u'x ri k'axal tzij man are ta «u bixic ri cäpe na», xane' ri bochi'nem re ri Dios: «Chattzelej, cha'.» C'ä ri pixabanic re k'atbal tzij man cäraj ta u sachic, xane' u tzelexic ri winak che qui colic — «man quinwaj taj ri u cämical ri banal etzelal» (Ri Ezequiel 33:11).

mis.w: «Ri c'amem bic cuc'ut chi ri Dios xuya' can ronojel ri Israel.»
mis.t: Ri c'amem bic man are ta yaqui'lal, xane' pixabanic ruc' suc'umaxic jacha' jun Tat ruc' ri lok'alaj ral (Ri Hebreos 12:6). Ri Dios man xel ta bic; xc'oji' ruc' ri Daniel pa nim re ri c'amem bic xukuje' xubij: «In e weta'm ri chomanic… che u ya'ic jun eyebal c'uxaj ri cäpe na» (Ri Jeremiy 29:11).

mis.w: «We pa 400 junab man c'o ta Tzij, ¿mawi che ri Dios xel bic o cuxlanic?»
mis.t: Ri taninic man are ta xa man c'o taj. Xak man xch'aw taj, are c'u che ronojel we k'ij ri' cuyac ri nimak tinimit, ch'abal, ruc' be che u banic ri be re ri toc'obanic. Pa ri kas tanibal k'ij, ri Dios cächacun ruc' nim lok'ok'enic chuwäch ronojel (Aj Galasib 4:4).

mis.w: «Ri Jesus xa jun chic chquixo'l ri utzalaj tak tijonelab; ri ripibal jun c'axalaj ch'aquem.»
mis.t: Ri Jesus xubij chi are Dios (Ri Xuan 8:58), xukuje' ri ripibal man xa ta xc'ulmataj o ch'aquem, xane' lok'ok'enic chomatalic. Man xc'am ta bic ruc' chuk'ab, xane' rib xuya' ru c'aslemal (Ri Xuan 10:18). «Man c'o ta jun nim na u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x chuwäch wa', chi cuya' ri u c'aslemal che qui q'uexwäch ri rachil» (Ri Xuan 15:13).

mis.w: «Ri iglesia jun molaj re winak ri man c'o ta qui mac, o xa jun ja.»
mis.t: Ri iglesia man are ta jun comon re «loc'olab ri tz'aktinak», xane' re ajmaquib ri sachom qui mac. C'ä ri apostol Pablo xubij chrij rib: «in c'u ri' nim na ri nu mac chquiwäch conojel» (Nabe Timotey 1:15). Ri nabe iglesia xukuje' xch'a'o xukuje' xtzakic (Banoj 6:1; Nabe aj Corintib 1:11). Man are ta jun k'olibal re nimarisanic, xane' winak ri cäquik'ax ri lok'ok'enic ri xquic'amo (Ri Xuan 13:34-35).

core.title: Ri nabe mac — man c'o ta jun suc'
core.body: Ri c'olic man are ta «jujun itzel tak chac», xane' ri u xe' ri animaj. Chreje ri Adan, conojel quealax chuxe' ri mac xukuje' man quecuin ta cu' che opanic ruc' ri Dios.
core.vtext: Man c'o ta jun suc'! ¡Mawi jun!… Conojel c'ut e macuninak. E najtajisam che ri u juluwem ri Dios.

core.title: Ri pixab man cäcuin ta che nu colic
core.body: Ri pixab man are ta jun pak'bal, xane' jun lemow. Ri kas cawaj cabano, kas cuc'ut chawäch jas naj cattzakic. Ri u rayibal are u c'amic bic ka c'u'x ruc' ri Crist.
core.vtext: Are c'u ri pixab xak xuwi cuk'alajisaj chkawäch chi uj ajmaquib… ri pixab xujuchajij… che ka c'amic bic ruc' ri Crist.

core.title: Rumal tok'ob — jun sipanic, man are ta chac
core.body: Ri toc'obanic man are ta ri tojbal re chac molom, xane' jun sipanic re ri Dios che ri man takal ta che. Rumal ri' man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u nimarisaxic rib.
core.vtext: Rumal ri u tok'ob ri Dios ix colotajinak chic, rumal ri i cojonic… Man cumal ta jastak ri quibano, rech jeri' man c'o ta jun cuya' cunimarisaj rib.

core.title: K'alajisam suc' rumal ri cojonic
core.body: Man rumal ta u nimaxic ri pixab, xane' rumal cojonic che ri Jesucrist cäk'alajisaxic chi uj suc' — man cojrik'ow ta che ri ka suc'umal, xane' che ri u suc'umal rija'.
core.vtext: Aretak k'alajisam chic chi uj suc' rumal ri ka cojonic, c'o jamaril chkaxo'l ruc' ri Dios… man c'o ta jun winak cäk'alajisaxic chi suc'… xane' rumal ri qui cojonic che ri Jesucrist.

core.title: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab cuc'ut ri Jesus
core.body: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man are ta jun wuj re nimak tak achijab o jun wuj re to'baxic rib. Chreje ri Chapletajic c'ä che ri K'alajisanic, ronojel u xak cuya' k'alajisanic chrij xa jun: ri Jesucrist.
core.vtext: E are c'u wa' ri queyo'w k'alajisanic chwij… Xuk'alajisaj chquiwäch ri Tzij ri qui bim can chrij ri are' pa conojel ri Tz'ibatalic.

core.title: Ri rajawibal ri Dios — ri u c'u'x re u tzij ri Jesus
core.body: Ri tzijonem ri nim xuc'ut ri Jesus. Ri rajawibal jawi' ri Dios cätaqui'n jacha' ajawinel xoc cho ri uwächulew ruc' ri Jesus xukuje' cätz'akat na pa ri u tzelejem. Rumal ri ripibal ruc' ri c'astajibal, ri Jesus are ri kas Ajawinel ri xuch'ac ri mac, ri cämical, ruc' ri Satanas.
core.vtext: Xtz'akat ronojel, xopan ri k'ij. Nakaj chic c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios. Chiq'uexa' i c'u'x, chixcojon che ri utzalaj tak u tzij.

core.title: Ri utzalaj tzij — rija' xutz'akatisaj ronojel
core.body: Ri q'uexel re ri mac ri man quincuin ta che tojic, ri Jesus xutoj pa nu q'uexel pa ri ripibal, xukuje' rumal ri c'astajibal xuch'ac ri cämical. Man quinjeker ta chrij ri «chabano,» xane' chrij ri «xtz'akatic.»
core.vtext: Xtz'akatic… Aretak c'ä uj ajmaquib, ri Crist xcäm rumal kech.

s.ui.footer: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab pa jun chapanic · Tzij re ri Loc'olaj Pixab re Quiché
s.hero.kicker: CHREJE RI BANOJ C'Ä CHE RI IGLESIA
s.hero.title:
Ri Loc'olaj Pixab,
pa jun chapanic
s.hero.sub: Pa xa jun chapanic, chariko ri nimalaj tzijonem re ri Loc'olaj Pixab — xukuje' jas che xpe ri Jesus.
s.thread.eyebrow: XA JUN TZIJ RI CUYUJ RONOJEL
s.thread.h2: Che ri k'isbal, ri Loc'olaj Pixab xa jun tzijonem
s.thread.note: Ri Dios cubij u bixic (trato), ri winak cäquieyej naj k'ij, xukuje' che ri k'isbal ronojel cätz'akatic xukuje' cätz'akatisax ruc' ri Jesus. Cha'terenej ri 13 banoj ri e c'o ikim ruc' wa' be — cha'q'uitzu' ri «Sic'ij na pu chic» pa jujun tarjeta che ri kas tzijonem.
s.gospel.h2: Ri kas u c'u'x ri Loc'olaj Pixab
s.gospel.lead: Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man are ta jun wuj re tijonic chrij «u banic utzalaj winak.»
s.gospel.sublead: Are jun tzijonem chrij jas ri Dios, xa rumal tok'ob, xebucol ri ajmaquib ri man quecuin ta che qui colic cu'. Pa ru c'u'x c'o ri Jesucrist.
s.gospel.mirror:
Ri jutak mul re Israel kas u wächbal «in»

Xajbal idolos→C'axc'olil→Sic'inic→Ri Dios cätoc'obanic→Xajbal idolos chic…

Chreje ri K'atal tak Tzij c'ä che ri c'amem bic, ri Israel cuban wa' jutak mul ri man cäk'is taj. Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man xutz'ibaj ta wa' rech cojetzeloj quib: «jas k'isbal kech.»

Are jun lemow. Ri u c'u'x man are ta «je wa' xquibano ri are',» xane' che kilic chi «in xukuje' jeri' quinbano» (Nabe aj Corintib 10:11).

Jun idol man xa ta jun tz'akom chuwächbal. Are ronojel ri cakalok'oj o cäcubi' ka c'u'x chrij chuwäch ri Dios — meu, ch'aquem, ya'ic k'ij, winak, c'ä in. Xukuje' u cojic ri Dios jacha' jun chac re u banic ri nu rayibal are xukuje' xajbal idolos.

Che ri k'isbal, ri kas idol are «in t'uyul pa ru tem ri Dios.»
s.gospel.coreIntro: ¿Jas c'u che ri Dios cucol wa' ajmac? Are wa' ri u c'u'x ri utzalaj tzij ri cutzijoj ri Loc'olaj Pixab.
s.gospel.crux:
Ronojel ri Loc'olaj Pixab cuc'ut xa jun k'olibal.

Ri winak man xecuin taj che u wach'ic ri jutak mul re mac cu', xukuje' man c'o ta jun suc'. Rumal ri' c'o jun ri c'o che cutoj ri q'uexel pa qui q'uexel.

Ri Jesus man xa ta xpe che u ya'ic utzalaj tijonic. Man c'o ta jun be chic re nu colic, rumal ri' xpe.

Ri c'o ta che xc'oji' pa we ripibal ri' are in.
Ri Jesus xuc'am ri nu mac xukuje' xrip waral pa nu q'uexel.

«Xsoc qui mac quech ri e ka c'ulelanic, xban c'ax che qui mac… cumal ri e u socotajic cakarik rutzil ka wäch.» — Ri Isaiy 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ ¿Jun camisanel ri cäcojon xa cäbe chicaj, are c'u jun ri utz xc'asi' ri man cäcojon taj cäbe pa tij?
s.faq.a1:
Are jun pakbal tzij suc'. Are c'u quieb sachibal na'oj awatal chuxe'.

① Ri Loc'olaj Pixab man cujach ta ri winak pa «utz vs. itzel.» Ri etabal man are ta «utz na chuwäch ri jun chic,» xane' «ri tz'akatalaj loc'olal re ri Dios.» Chuwäch rija', man c'o ta jun «utz na» (Aj Romab 3:23). Rumal ri' wa' man are ta «utzalaj winak vs. camisanel,» xane' jacha' quieb ri c'o xa jun camical yab cuc': jun cuc'am ri cunabal, ri jun chic cresaj rib, cubij: «utz na ri nu wäch chuwäch rija'.»

② Xa jun cäjachow ri caj ruc' ri tij. Man are ta ri rajil ri chac, xane' we ac'amom ri Jesucrist jacha' Ajaw xukuje' ri c'ax re ri a mac xsuc'umtajic. Ri c'o suc'umam ri u mac rumal ri u quic'el ri Crist cäbe chicaj; ri man cuc'am ta wi, ri c'ä c'o ri u mac, mawi cäbe. Man c'o ta jun utzalaj chac cäcuin che u suc'umaxic ri c'ax re ri mac.

Rumal ri' ri caj ruc' ri tij man are ta jun «tojbal re utzalaj noc'ojanic,» xane' jun u banic re ri rachilanic ruc' ri Crist. Xukuje' «cojonic» man are ta jun na'oj re ri jolomaj, xane' jun q'uexem re jachin cätaqui'n pa ri c'aslemal: ri kas cuc'amo man cärilo nim, xane' cäk'ax ranima nim na. Are c'u ri u suc'umaxic rib («utzalaj winak in») ri kas c'ax che wach'ic, ri cubano cojuchoman chi man cärajawaxic ta ri Crist (Ri Lucax 18:9-14).

Ri Loc'olaj Pixab cubij k'alaj: «Ri cäcojon che are', man cäk'at ta tzij puwi. Are c'u ri man cäcojon taj, k'atom chi tzij puwi'» (Ri Xuan 3:18). Ri k'atbal tzij man are ta «u choboxic ri a c'aslemal aretak catcäm chic,» xane' k'atom chi rumal we xac'amo ri Crist.

Aj Romab 3:23 · Ri Xuan 3:18 · Aj Epesib 2:8-9 · Ri Lucax 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ ¿Mawi xa che u banic utzalaj c'aslemal, pune' man quincojon ta che ri Jesus?
s.faq.a2:
Are wa' ri nim na cächomaxic, are c'u cusach u wäch jas ri «kas c'olic.» Cojya' jun wächbal.

Cha'chomaj chi at c'o pa jun barco re elek'omab. Pune' nim cabano che u meso'xic ri barco, kas utz cabano cuc' ri e c'o pa ri barco, kas jeb'el ri a c'aslemal — c'ä at jun elek'om, rumal chi ri barco cattuc'aj jawi' cäbe wi (ri c'olibal re k'atbal tzij). Ri c'olic man are ta «ri rajil ri chac,» xane' «jawi' barco at-c'o wi» (ri awach).

Rumal ri' ri utzalaj tzij man cubij ta «cha'tija' awib che u banic utzil»; cubij «chaq'uexa' ri barco.» Cha'kaj ulok che ri barco re ri mac xukuje' cha'ic'owo ruc' ri Jesus — pa ri c'ac' awach re jun ral ri Dios. Wa' man are ta u nimarisaxic ri a noc'ojanic ruc' chac, xane' u cubsaxic a c'u'x chrij ri yo'w ru k'ab xukuje' catic'ow ruc' ru barco.

Kas tzij ri Loc'olaj Pixab cubij ri toc'obanic jacha' wa' q'uexem — «Xujresaj pa ri u cuinem ri k'eku'm, xujuk'axej c'u pa ri rajawibal ri lok'alaj u C'ojol» (Aj Colosayib 1:13).

Mawi casach u wäch: man cubij ta chi ri utzalaj c'aslemal man c'o ta u patan. Ri utzil man are ta ri «u rajawaxic» re ri toc'obanic, xane' ri u wäch. Ri xq'uextaj ru barco wacamic cäc'asi' utz man rumal ta xibanic, xane' rumal ri lok'ok'enic re jun ral.

Aj Colosayib 1:13 · Ri Xuan 1:12 · Ri Xuan 3:3 · Aj Epesib 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ We jun banal c'ax cubij «xutoc'obej chic nu wäch ri Dios» xukuje' c'o pa jamaril aretak ri xc'ax che c'ä cäc'axc'obic — ¿mawi sibalaj nucan ri toc'obanic?
s.faq.a3:
Ri pakbal tzij suc', xukuje' ri c'ax kas tzij. Are c'u jun u bixic jacha' wa' man are ta «ri toc'obanic re ri Loc'olaj Pixab» — are jun q'uexem re.

① Ri u toc'obanic ri Dios man cuc'is ta nucan. Ri mac man cäc'uyic jacha' ta «man c'o ta xbantajic»; ri Dios rib xutoj ru q'uexel ruc' ru c'aslemal ri u C'ojol. Ri ripibal man cuc'ut taj chi ri mac cänim taj, xane' jas nim ri mac: are ri kas c'ax na toc'obanic cho ri uwächulew.

② Ri kas q'uexem c'u'x cuya' u wäch. We jun banal c'ax cärilo nim chuwäch ri xc'ax che — «xutoc'obej chic nu wäch ri Dios, jeri' in c'o pa jamaril» — man are ta q'uexem c'u'x, xane' jun u wächbal (Ri Mateo 3:8). Xukuje' ri toc'obanic chquixo'l jun winak ruc' ri Dios man cuc'is ta ri u soquic ri xc'ax che, xukuje' man cuya' ta ku' che ri xc'ax che chi cutoc'obej.

③ Ri mac man are ta xa «cäya' canok.» Ronojel mac cätojic pa jun chquixo'l quieb c'olibal — o ri Crist cuc'amo pa ri ripibal (che ri cäcojon che rija' man c'o ta chi k'atbal tzij, Aj Romab 8:1), o ri man cuc'am ta wi che ri k'isbal, rija' cuc'amo. Rumal ri' man c'o ta «toc'obanic nucan.» Ri banal c'ax c'o u q'uexel xukuje' chuwäch ri k'atbal tzij re wa' uwächulew (Aj Romab 13:1-4).

④ Ri u wa'l u wäch ri xc'ax che man e nuch'in ta chuwäch ri Dios. Ri Dios cäok' cuc' ri queok'ic, cänataj che ronojel u wa'l u wäch, xukuje' che ri k'isbal rib cusu' na (Ri K'alajisanic 21:4). Rumal ri' ri xc'ax che man cuc'am ta xa rutil ri toj q'uexel, xane' cäcuin che u jachic che ri Dios suc' (Aj Romab 12:19 — «Wech in ri tojow q'uexel, in quintojow na, cächa' ri Ajawaxel»).

Ri Mateo 3:8 · Aj Romab 8:1 · Aj Romab 13:1-4 · Ri K'alajisanic 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ ¿Kas tzij lo waˈ ri cˈo pa ri Lokˈalaj Pixab? Junam rucˈ jun ojer tzijonem o jun chˈabexic chˈacˈal.
s.faq.a4:
Are jun utzalaj cˈutunic waˈ — xukujeˈ jun utzalaj qˈuijilaˈbal richin xticholobej. Ri quieb cˈuˈxaj man are tä ri caˈno jun rucˈ ri cojonic, xane are ri rayinic chi cäquilo we kas tzij ri cˈu cäbixic. Ri Lokˈalaj Pixab man are tä jun chˈabexic ri cäˈcojonic xa we cäcaj ri kanima, xane are jun tzˈibanic ri xtzˈibax pa quiwiˈ kas tak juyub, kˈij, xukujeˈ winak. Xak quieb oxib cˈutbal waˈ.

① Man xa tä jun wuj, xane jun "cˈolbal wuj" — pune jelaˈ junam ri u banic. Ri Lokˈalaj Pixab are jun cˈolic re oxcˈal lajuj (66) wuj ri xtzˈibax pa jun beyal richin jun mil rucˈ jobˈ ciento (1,500) junab, cumal cawinak (40) winak — e nimak ajawab, e yukˈ, e chapal car, jun yacöl alcabal, jun cunanel, winak re jalajoj taq pamabal xukujeˈ jalajoj taq kˈij, xquitzˈibaj pa quityol man xquetamaj tä quib chquiwäch, pa oxib chˈabal (hebreo, arameo, griego). Pune jeˈ xa junam queˈopan wi, man cˈo tä mes, pa jun beyal xa: ri colotajic rumal ri Crist. Are jun junamil ri cˈäx u bixic xa we rumal jun banobal o rumal qui chˈobonic ri winak.

② Cäcˈaman u wäch pa ri ulew (arqueología). E qˈuia jastak ri nabe xbix chquij chi xak xuwi tzˈibatalic, "xak xuwi cˈo pa ri Lokˈalaj Pixab," xcˈaman na u wäch rumal ri cˈotic. Ri nimalaj rachalal David rumal jun abaj tzˈibatal "ri rachoch David" chwäch (ri Tel Dan); ri Poncio Pilato, ri kˈatbal tzij ri xcämisan re Jesús, rumal jun tzˈibanic ri cucˈam ri u biˈ; ri xⁿbel ri jaˈ rech ri nim takanel Ezequías (Ucab Ajawinelab 20:20) rumal ri kas xⁿbel xukujeˈ ri u tzˈibal. Pune ri aj heteos, ri nabe xbix chquij chi "xak winak chˈacˈal," xeˈcˈamen u wäch jun nimalaj ajawbal pa ri xeqˈuis cˈolic.

③ Are ri ojer wuj ri kas utz u chajixic (tzˈibanic chˈacˈal). Pa ri qˈuiyal re tzˈibanic chˈacˈal ri e cˈolatajinak, ri qui junamil chquixol, xukujeˈ ri kˈij ri xⁿcˈow chquixol ri tzˈibanic rucˈ ri cˈolic, ri Lokˈalaj Pixab cˈo na u wäch chquixol ronojel ri ojer taq wuj. Ri u botabal Isaías chquixol ri Wuj re ri Cämnak Mar (xⁿrik pa 1947), ri xtzˈibax nabe chuwäch ri Crist, junam rucˈ ri nim u banic tzˈib re jun mil (1,000) junab cˈä teˈ — jun cˈutbal chi ri Lokˈalaj Pixab kas utz xchajix chquij ronojel taq kˈij.

④ Ri jastak ri xtzˈibax nabe xeˈbantaj kas jelaˈ (ri kˈalajisanic). Ri Ojer Trato, ri xtzˈibax cˈij siento junab nabe chuwäch ri Jesús, cucˈut pa jun beyal kas u banic ri ralcˈualaxic pa Belén (Miqueas 5:2), ri patänel ri xⁿrik cˈäx (Isaías 53:5), xukujeˈ ri u banic ri cruz (Salmo 22). Kas chˈobtalic chi man xa tä cˈulbal u wäch.

⑤ Ri tzˈibalölaj tzij ri man e cˈo tä pa ri Lokˈalaj Pixab xukujeˈ xquitzˈibaj. Ri romano tzˈibalölaj tzij Tácito xukujeˈ ri judío tzˈibalölaj tzij Josefo — man e cojonel tä waˈ — cäquibij u wäch ri Jesús, ri u cämisaxic, xukujeˈ ri nabe iglesia. Nim na chuwäch ronojel, ri tijoxelab ri xa quiyojinak rumal xibinic xquiya quikˈij chukˈalajisaxic ri cˈastajibal — man cˈo tä jun cäcäm rumal jun jastak ri retaˈam chi xak banoj tzij.

Pune kˈalaj wi, we cˈutbal riˈ cäquicˈut chi ri cojonic che ri Lokˈalaj Pixab man xa tä jun chˈobonic chˈacˈal, xane kas naˈtajinak; man are tä jun "cˈutbal" ri quetˈij quchuxic junam rucˈ jun ajilanic. Rumal riˈ ri u jiquibam u cˈuˈx jun cojonel man xa tä rumal ri cˈutbal, xane rumal ri jiquibal cˈuˈxlaxic ri cuya ri Lokˈalaj Espíritu pa ri animaˈj aretak cäsiqˈuix ri Tzij. Cubij ri Lokˈalaj Pixab — Rajawaxic chi jun winak nabe cutatabej na jun tzij rech cäcojonic. Ri tzij ri cutatabej, are ri u tzij ri Crist. (Aj Romab 10:17). Rumal cˈu riˈ, pune jelaˈ junam rucˈ jun chˈabexic chˈacˈal, ri casiqˈuij at ayel are ri u tikaribal. Ri cˈutbal cujak ri uchija, y ri jiquibal cˈuˈxaj cäqˈuiy pa ranima ri cäsiqˈuinic.

Ucab Ajawinelab 20:20 · Ri Isaiy 53:5 · Miqueas 5:2 · Aj Romab 10:17
s.respond.sub: Wa' lok'ok'enic man are ta etamabal, xane' jun sic'inic. We ri lok'ok'enic ri xrip pa a q'uexel xchapow ri awanima, cha'bana' wa' ch'awem chanim, jun ratz'iyak jun ratz'iyak, chanim chanim.
s.respond.prayer:
Dios,

quinch'obo chi in jun ajmac ri man quincuin ta che nu colic.

Quincojo chi ri Jesus xcäm rumal wech pa ri ripibal xukuje' xc'astaj chic.

Cha'sacha' ronojel ri nu mac, xukuje' chreje wacamic catux ri Wajaw re ri nu c'aslemal.

Chinac'amo jacha' a c'ojol, xukuje' chaya' chwe quinc'asi' jun c'ac' c'aslemal.

Pa ru bi' ri Jesus quinban wa' ch'awem. Amen.
s.respond.after: We xabano wa' ch'awem ruc' ronojel awanima, ri Loc'olaj Pixab cubij chi xatux jun ral ri Dios. Man at-tuquel ta chic — cha'tzucuj jun iglesia nakaj xukuje' cha'bina' junam ruc' niq'uiaj pa ri cojonic.
s.respond.read: Chasik'ij ri Loq'alaj Wuj — chamajij rukʼ ri Xuan
s.respond.verse: «Conojel c'ut ri xec'amowic, ri quecojon che ri u bi', xuya' ri c'olbal chque chi quebux ralc'ual ri Dios.» — Ri Xuan 1:12 · Aj Romab 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Xa jun Dios,
ruc' xa jun tzijonem,
cojutzucuj ruc' jun lok'ok'enic
ri man cätani taj.
s.closing.verse: «Mawi ri cämical, mawi ri c'aslemal… mawi ne jun jasach chic ri banom rumal ri Dios, cäcuin ta che ka tasic chrij ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Dios, ri yo'm chke rumal ri Crist Jesus ri Kajaw!» — Aj Romab 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Pa wa' tzijonem, ri Pixab, ri wuj re bix, ri k'axal tak tzij, ruc' ri wuj cäquiya' ri «tio'jil.»
Wacamic, jachique wuj cajak, cawetamaj jawi' at-c'o wi pa ri tzijonem.
s.closing.map: Wa' ronojel tzijonem xc'ulmataj pa qui'b' qui'b' luwar e c'olic — cha'tereneba' pa jun mapa
s.about.line: Banom chrij ri chomanic re ri toc'obanic-tzijonem, evangelico · reformado ri cäquiya' u wäch ri u q'uiyal ri iglesia protestante re Corea.
s.about.contact: Pakbal tak tzij · na'oj — Cha'taka' jun wuj
